nasb.text: “Arise, go down to meet Ahab king of Israel, who is in Samaria; behold, he is in the vineyard of Naboth where he has gone down to take possession of it.

esv.text: “Arise, go down to meet Ahab king of Israel, who is in Samaria; behold, he is in the vineyard of Naboth, where he has gone to take possession.

cnv.text: “你起來，下去迎見住在撒瑪利亞的以色列王亞哈，他現在正在耶斯列人拿伯的葡萄園裡。他下到那裡去，是要佔有那個園。

ccb.text: “你去撒玛利亚见以色列王亚哈，他正在拿伯的葡萄园，他到那里要霸占那葡萄园。
